name: Ryan Mitchell
bio: Met during freshman orientation. We backpacked through Southeast Asia together after graduation. She just moved to Vancouver for a new job in UX design.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: Former manager who became a genuine friend. We play pickup basketball every few weekends and grab coffee to talk career stuff. Incredibly thoughtful person.

name: Ryan Mitchell
bio: Grew up on the same street. Our families have been close for decades. She's a pediatric nurse in Chennai now and we try to video call at least twice a month.

name: Daniel Okafor
bio: College roommate for two years. Now a software engineer at a startup in Lagos. We bond over late-night debugging sessions over voice chat and sharing memes about broken builds.

name: Karim Ahmadi
bio: Met through a local book club three years ago. We ended up becoming neighbors and now do weekly walks. She's a translator fluent in Farsi, French, and English.

name: Tom Nakashima
bio: Best friends in high school, bonded over playing guitar in a terrible band. He's now a session musician in Tokyo. We drift apart and reconnect in big bursts.

name: Kofi Diallo
bio: Met at a 10K race two years ago and ended up at the same company six months later. We do long runs on Sunday mornings and debrief over brunch. She's training for her first marathon.

name: Elliot Vasquez
bio: Met in a philosophy elective. Our conversations about ethics and free will kept going well past the class. He's now doing his PhD in Barcelona and we exchange voice memos instead of texts.
